programme.title: Bad Santa 2

programme.title: Domino

programme.desc: Gon and Killua are exhausted after their fight with Knuckle as the second assassin, Shoot, lies in wait.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle points out to Gon that there are flaws in his ultimate technique, the Ja Jan Ken.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Killua faces Shoot while Gon takes on Knuckle.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Race Toward the Brink
programme.desc: Stroheim is back from the brink, now as a cyborg designed to secure the great Red Stone. Kars, however, is not willing to concede and wages war, even as the stone hurtles toward an alpine cliff.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Lisa Lisa paints a picture of honor when she reveals Caesar’s tragic past to Joseph. Meanwhile, in the face of certain danger, Caesar enters into a solitary battle to avenge his father.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Lisa Lisa paints a picture of honor when she reveals Caesar’s tragic past to Joseph. Meanwhile, in the face of certain danger, Caesar enters into a solitary battle to avenge his father.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Inside a shadowy St. Moritz hotel, danger leaves Joseph and Lisa Lisa no time to mourn as they follow a bloody trail to Wamuu and Kars. Luckily, Lisa Lisa manages to strike a deal—but, of course, with one condition.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Joseph and Wamuu finally face off in an equestrian one-on-one. But will Joseph’s adroit attacks and weapon-grasping prowess be enough to keep Wamuu’s millennia-old pride in check?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Warrior of Wind
programme.desc: When the battle between Wamuu and Joseph comes to a head, the surprising confessions aren’t far behind. Now the final hour has come for Lisa Lisa and Kars—a fighter very different from his fellow Pillar Men.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Ties that Bind JoJo
programme.desc: With Lisa Lisa’s life on the line, Joseph must deceive the deceiver. Joining Joseph, Stroheim and Speedwagon arrive at the battlefield, where a family tragedy threatens to doom the world to a hopeless future.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Birth of a Superbeing
programme.desc: Having seized the Red Stone and the mask, Kars has become the Ultimate Being. Now the seemingly invincible entity has his sights solely on Joseph who, fleeing, has one final trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Ascendant One
programme.desc: Deep within a volcano’s molten lava, Kars contemplates a comeback. But with the Red Stone’s power unleashed, both warriors are launched into the stratosphere of the unknown.

programme.title: Black Jack 21
programme.desc: BJ and Pinoko arrive into Okonja Village on a helicopter. However, many villagers have already died from various diseases. BJ persuades the reluctant pilot to fly further.

programme.title: Black Jack 21
programme.desc: BJ and Pinoko arrive in Macao. BJ leaves Pinoko in the hotel room and heads to Kagemitsu's mansion on his own. Renka greets BJ and introduces her daughter, Shoren.

programme.title: Black Jack 21
programme.desc: BJ and Pinoko wait at the departure gate when the airport security ask them to follow. They were led to the SKY HOSPITAL (SH) where Dr. Shirabyoshi and Dr. Nishikawa were waiting.

programme.title: Black Jack 21
programme.desc: There was a high possibility that BJ, Dr. Shirabyoshi, Pinoko and Dr. Nishikawa on board the SKY HOSPITAL (SH) have been infected by Phoenix Disease.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In North Wessex Downs, Charlie Ross hunts for 'sparkly' antiques but is distracted by an Edwardian box that holds a surprise. And Izzie Balmer rummages in a shop's storeroom -- what goodies will she uncover?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A rare antique gets Charlie Ross quite excited while Izzie Balmer gambles on some furniture. Their classic car is pointed to the south coast for auction but who'll claim victory?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Charlie Ross sail to the Isle of Wight for their final leg. Our experts go into auction battle one last time, when Izzie's silver brooch goes against Charlie's silver pen.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth and Steven Moore travel from the Borders to the Lake District. They encounter the story of the country's greatest archers and visit a part of Scotland that's slowly revealing its secrets to archaeologists.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth are shopping their way along the byways of Scotland. Angus bags something aromatic and coffee related, while Steven springs for a little treasure from his fellow expert's back yard in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: While Angus Ashworth strips off for an unlikely history lesson, Steven Moore tucks into a local delicacy. Will a rough ferry crossing leave them feeling sick at the Clitheroe auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth hit the byways of Derbyshire and Yorkshire. They visit a couple of survivors from the Industrial Revolution and enjoy some regional pastries before heading off to an auction in the town of Bedale.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth browse the emporiums of northeast England, parting with their big budget. But who will be victorious at the deciding auction in Dundee?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper sightsee around Northern Ireland in an old VW Beetle, on the lookout for an antique bargain. David visits the oldest distillery in the world, and Louise heads to the coast to sample some seaweed.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper continue their adventures in Northern Ireland. David gets a shock when he gets his hands on a Victorian cure-all, while Louise finds an ally while shopping.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper hit the shops in the northwest of England in their classic VW Beetle, keeping an eye out for items of interest, including some KGB spy equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper are in Wales, where Louise hopes to be sitting pretty with her collection of chairs, and David tries to step out of his comfort zone.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper begin their last day on the moors of West Yorkshire. Louise gets her hands on a very early labor-saving device, and David takes a shine to some theatre seats, but how many he can afford?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp splurges on an expensive French sunburst clock, and a Victorian scent bottle has her swooning. But former soldier Raj Bisram finds ammunition boxes and a steel helmet a lot more attractive.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the backdrop of the Farnborough wind tunnels.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for the races as they arrive at Chepstow Racecourse.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A second visit for Fiona Bruce and the experts at Stowe School in Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the Scarborough Spa Pavilion for another busy day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This is the second episode from RAF Marham, Norfolk.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An Irish bar owner's American dream threatens to go up in smoke when Jon discovers he's been withholding employees' paychecks to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon wants to save the mice-infested, touristy Fort One Bar & Lounge, he'll need to get the spoiled owner who was gifted the bar to stop taking it for granted.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the owner of an Omaha, NE, hookah bar whose money is going up in smoke thanks to his staff's frat-house ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of the Summit House Grill and Tap has pushed his marriage and business to the breaking point by drinking away his financial sorrows and hitting on female patrons.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of George & Dragon come to terms with his mother's death before he drinks away all his profits and the family legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon's attempt to save the YNot Sports Pub & Grub gets off to a bad start when there isn't enough staff on hand for a stress test.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to re-establish a sense of unity at O'Banion's in Nebraska, where a binge-drinking owner has been usurped in a hostile takeover by his partners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps bring a golf-themed establishment up to par by getting rid of the grime and reassessing the staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps the owners of an auto-themed bar tap the brakes on their tempers and hit the gas on getting their liquor license approved by city officials.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in New Mexico to help Mike, the owner of Lucky 66 Bowl, who is over a million dollars in debt and keeps driving customers and employees out the door with his temper.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Ever since extended family members were put on the payroll at The Tailgate in Santa Clarita, CA, business has taken a nosedive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A massive earthquake destroys Baywatch headquarters and leaves Gina's life hanging in the balance. Meanwhile, Cort and Craig are trapped in the ocean. And Eddie is the only one left who can help a pregnant woman going into labor.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch rescues an underwater photographer that appears to have been attacked by a Sea Creature in an underwater cave, resulting in a media frenzy. Shauni rescues a young girl in the ocean then has to rescue her family from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his ex-wife Gayle reconnect at their twenty-year high school reunion with unforeseen results. Eddie discovers an abandoned baby under his tower with a note imploring him to take care of it for 24 hours.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Drug lord Mason Sato is released from prison and determined to seek revenge Mitch Buchannon, who helped send him away. When Sato kidnaps Hobie and Kaye, Mitch and Sato end up in a samurai-style fight to the death.

programme.title: Bellator 199: Bader vs King Mo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with an absolutely stacked fight card as Ryan Bader collides with King Mo in Heavyweight Grand Prix action; Paul Daley takes on Jon Fitch in a dynamic matchup at welterweight, and Cheick Kongo and Javy Ayala go toe to toe.

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, OK as Julia Budd puts her women’s featherweight world championship on the line against the undefeated Talita Nogueira in the main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls as South Dakota native Logan Storley looks to extend his undefeated streak as he takes on the always dangerous AJ Matthews. Bantamweight king Darrion Caldwell moves up to featherweight to face Noad.

programme.title: Bellator 205: McKee vs Macapa
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Boise, Idaho with an explosive featherweight main event as rising star AJ McKee takes on dangerous veteran John Macapa. Also looking to stay undefeated is Rafael Lovato Jr. as he faces fellow submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose. Legends Rampage Jackson and Wanderlei Silva settle the score with a rematch ten years in the making. Finally, in the main event Gegard Mousasi defends his Middleweight belt against Rory MacDonald.

programme.title: Bellator 207: Mitrione vs Bader
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun as Matt Mitrione faces off against Ryan Bader in the Heavyweight World Grand Prix semifinals. Roy “Big County” Nelson takes on dangerous Russian Sergei Kharitonov, and top welterweight contender Lorenz Larkin returns.

programme.title: Bellator 208: Fedor vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Long Island as MMA legend Fedor Emelianenko takes on the American Gangster Chael Sonnen with the winner advancing to the finals of the Heavyweight World Grand Prix. Also, Benson Henderson and Cheick Kongo return to the cage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Brittany who says dad Charlie is being scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie hopes to get married when they meet in person. The real women in the photos are on stage & Charlie goes face-to-face!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Autumn says she was called a “crazy, jealous girlfriend” after video of her keying her ex-boyfriend’s car went viral. She says ex-boyfriend, D’Andre, choked her, head-butted her and sexually assaulted her; D’Andre denies sexually assaulting her. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caylee Anthony's image has been splashed across magazine covers and TV screens in an effort to find the missing 3-year-old. With the bizarre twists and turns in this story, Dr. Phil's panel of experts probe into the case that has captivated millions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes an intense look at the life of Star, a stay-at-home mom who fears that her dangerous habit may take a turn for the worse. Star's 11-year-old daughter, Autumn, sends Dr. Phil a poignant plea for help before tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says she's fed up with husband Jason's, mom, Kathy. Angie says her mother-in-law is rude, judgmental & meddles. Kathy says Angie is a liar & cheater & she's responsible for all the drama. Can Dr. Phil help these in-laws put years of animosity aside?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At age 45, Jeff moved back into his childhood bedroom in his mother's home & has reverted to a high schooler, for 16 years. Jeff's daughter, Tori, says her dad is a terrible father, an immature coward. Jeff comes face-to-face with his fed-up family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Megan's ex-boyfriend Andy is trying to replace her as their 5-year-old son's mother with his new fiancée, Caitlin. Megan says Andy lied to the judge, falsely painting her as unfit, unstable & a drug addict. Andy says Megan's tale of woe is a sob story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kristle, Kayla & Patrick say mom Sherry has blown a $250,000 inheritance in 11 months, with $500 bar tabs & new motorcycles. But that's not it. They say mom takes non-prescribed pills, washes them down with rum & has pulled out a loaded gun while arguing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: On Facebook, unexpected things happen, like reuniting with a loved one or being fired after posting an inappropriate photograph. It can also be a lifesaver, offering a human connection when all seems lost. Dr. Phil delves into a story that made headlines.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason Collier was a perfect boyfriend, handsome, & a well-respected police chief of a Texas town. But multiple women he was dating discovered that Jason Collier was every woman's worst nightmare: a married man lying to his wife but also to them. Pt. 2

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.desc: With the rednecks now in teams, previously formed alliances begin to break down.

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 09/25/2016. Lisa Ling gains unprecedented access to the Los Angeles County Jail to understand what it takes to manage the country’s busiest jail.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/02/2016. Join Lisa Ling as she steps into the cage with three female fighters who are turning the sport of mixed martial arts on its head.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/16/2016. Is the gentler approach to heroin use being applied equally to the rich and poor, Black and White? Lisa Ling goes to Chicago to investigate.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/23/2016. Lisa Ling travels to the most famous legal brothel, Dennis Hof’s Moonlite Bunny Ranch, to meet the women who are making a living off lust.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/30/2016. Meet ambitious young people in San Francisco, who hope to become the next Mark Zuckerberg.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 11/13/2016. Lisa Ling embeds with the Philadelphia Police Department to explore how new technology is changing what it means to be an officer in America.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 11/20/2016. Should rapists be allowed to have visitation with their child? Lisa Ling talks with sexual assault survivors who are fighting this in court.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 11/27/2016. Lisa Ling investigates why some women seek a romantic companionship with a prison inmate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.desc: Cuando la exnovia de Horatio Caine muere en una explosión, el equipo busca dentro de su propio departamento para encontrar al asesino.

programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sufre la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos cuando un genio psicótico se descontrola en la hermosa Miami.

programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una camarera en un club exclusivo, Horatio debe buscar en la lista de invitados más elitista de Miami para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Vaneza descubrió que la bebé que adoptó es la nieta de su esposo y quiere revocar la adopción. Alberto fue a prisión por violación a su cuñada que tuvo un hijo y luego se suicidó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Alejandro se fue de fiesta, bebió mucho y despertó en el hospital golpeado y desgarrado analmente. Juan ganó la lotería, como es indocumentado acordó con su jefe cobrar el premio y dividirlo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Orlando descubre que mendigando en la calle saca una buena plata, una de sus hijas lo niega. Yuri y Magdalenys son dos niñas con un canal de modas en Youtube, pero quieren separarse.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Ella quiere que su pareja deje de consumir morning glory. Él alega que la sustancia mejora su productividad. Alexander perdió la custodia de su hijo al entrar en prisión. El menor se suicidó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Yahima quiere que su hija abandone la casa porque es una adicta a inhalar chocolate como droga. Por otro lado, la hija de Natalia es autista y en una fiesta tiró al suelo al bebé de Elena.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Yamilka está casada con Amhir, un polí­gamo y extremista, y ahora quiere salir de ese infierno. También, Joely se acercó a una congregación religiosa buscando apoyo pero perdió a su bebé.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luis tiene una carnicería en el 'mall' de Martina, pero ella es vegana y lo corrió. Además, Maya fue engañada por una agencia que la vendió a unos supuestos productores de cine.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jenny se emborrachó introduciéndose tampones con alcohol en la vagina. Por otro lado, Javier es bromista y por un chiste de mal gusto, Lola lo despidió de su asociación.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Wander desea adoptar a un niño, pero Tania, su mujer, no quiere porque se siente amenazada. Además, Valentina y Gabriela se sienten acosadas por un vecino que les dice piropos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Un niño se come una rebanada de tarta y se intoxica, porque el pastel era de marihuana. Por otro lado, el hijo de Juan se queda encerrado en una nave refrigerada y muere congelado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Taimy culpa a su cuñado de la muerte de su hermana inválida por dejarla sola durante los incendios forestales. Braida admira a su amiga Brayda, a quien le ha copiado todo, incluso el nombre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Gabriela y su esposo quieren tener hijos, pero por una malformación genética de ella no pueden lograrlo. En otro caso, Pilar es la amante de Alberto y en una salida ella se quemó las nalgas.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Elizabeth y Omar es autista, pero ninguno quiere la custodia de Fidel porque es adicto al porno. Además, la madre de Vanesa muere y ella demanda a la esposa del amante de su mamá.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hermano de Carlos está en coma por un intento de suicidio que, según él, fue inducido por una chica. Dennis y José tienen una asociación de ayuda al inmigrante, pero José cambió su enfoque.

programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: Toña Machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: Crímenes ocultos
programme.desc: Un miembro de la policía militar investiga una serie de asesinatos infantiles que ocurren durante la era de Stalin en la Unión Soviética.

programme.title: Desafío
programme.desc: Desafío es una fascinante aventura sobre la extraordinaria historia verdadera de los hermanos Bielski, simples agricultores -independientes y desarmados- que convirtieron a un grupo de refugiados de guerra en poderosos luchadores por la libertad.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: ¿Bailamos?
programme.desc: John Clark es un adicto al trabajo dócil que se siente atrapado en una existencia aburrida y soporífera. Una noche, su vida cambia tras ver a una hermosa instructora de danza que lo inspira a salirse de sus esquemas y aprender pasos elaborados.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: Jennifer López interpreta a una soltera que se enamora del hombre perfecto justo cuando decide ser madre en esta comedia romántica de éxito sobre el noviazgo, el amor, el matrimonio y la paternidad, pero no necesariamente en ese orden.

programme.title: Vuelo mortal
programme.desc: Cuando un avión comercial queda atrapado dentro de un anillo de volcanes en erupción, los pasajeros y la tripulación deberán encontrar una forma de sobrevivir sin aterrizar.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Hombres de coraje
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, Tom Sizemore y Thomas Jane protagonizan la estremecedora historia de héroes americanos que naufragaron en aguas infestadas de tiburones en los últimos días de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Inspirada en la experiencia de Oliver Stone, cuenta la historia de Chris Taylor (Charlie Sheen), un joven recluta enviado a Vietnam que presencia las atrocidades de la guerra, muchas perpetradas por aquellos que llama 'camaradas'.

programme.title: Comando especial
programme.desc: Charlie Sheen, Michael Biehn y Bill Paxton son tres de los mejores comandos del Navy de Estados Unidos. Ellos son enviados para rescatar una tripulación de un avión estadounidense que fue secuestrado por terroristas del Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Peligro en Bangkok
programme.desc: Joe (Nicolas Cage) es un asesino profesional que aterriza en Bangkok para ocuparse de unas obligaciones y se encuentra inesperadamente entrenando a un joven protegido y enamorándose de una mujer que desconoce su verdadero trabajo.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Hombres de coraje
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, Tom Sizemore y Thomas Jane protagonizan la estremecedora historia de héroes americanos que naufragaron en aguas infestadas de tiburones en los últimos días de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Piedras
programme.desc: La película narra la trayectoría paralela y conflictiva de cinco mujeres: Anita, Isabel, Adela, Leire, y Maricarmen. Ellas se esfuerzan para remover las piedras que insistentemente aparecen en su camino, o peor, que están en sus zapatos.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Aquí entre nos
programme.desc: Cansado de que su esposa y sus tres hijas lo tomen por sentado, Rodolfo Guerra se despierta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Luego empieza la locura.

programme.title: Todo incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: En busca del Santa secreto
programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.title: Blizzard: Un reno muy especial
programme.desc: Una historia encantadora de Katie y su amistad mágica con Blizzard, uno de los renos más nuevos de Santa. Blizzard usa sus poderes especiales para ayudar a Katie a darse cuenta de su potencial y fuerza interior.

programme.title: Una navidad real
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo de publicidad trabajador se enamora de un consultor que es un príncipe disfrazado.

programme.title: Un pueblo navideño

programme.title: En busca del Santa secreto
programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.title: Mi dulce Navidad

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Mientras Duermes
programme.desc: Un portero trastornado que tiene la manía de atormentar a sus residentes decide intimidar a la vecina más alegre y arruinarle la vida a toda costa.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: Texas: Masacre en cadena 2
programme.desc: La familia de psicópatas asesinos más peligrosa vuelve a la carga. Después de secuestrar a la DJ Vantia Block, deben enfrentarse a un policía texano que los persigue.

programme.title: La Treintena
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos están a punto de entrar en la treintena en medio de la cuarentena por coronavirus.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
programme.desc: Basada en la increíble historia real, Meryl Streep nos entrega una actuación cómica y conmovedora, como una mujer de sociedad de Nueva York que sueña con convertirse en una gran cantante de ópera, a pesar de tener una voz cómicamente espantosa.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: ¿Solo amigos?
programme.desc: Harto de malas relaciones, Wallace (Daniel Radcliffe), que abandonó su carrera de medicina, decide poner su vida amorosa en pausa. Tras enamorarse de Chantry (Zoe Kazan), una animadora que vive con su novio Ben (Rafe Spall), el "amor" se complica.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: The Shootist
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told
programme.desc: Max Von Sydow, John Wayne, Charlton Heston, Sidney Poitier, and Shelley Winters head an all-star cast in this lavish portrayal of the life of Jesus from legendary director George Stevens. This stunning epic truly is The Greatest Story Ever Told.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street
programme.desc: A man named Kris Kringle creates a stir when he's hired as a department store Santa Claus.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria befriends the box boy, George, who works at the local supermarket and happens to be mentally handicapped. When Archie discovers this, all of his misconceptions come pouring out and he encourages Gloria not to lead him on.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: How far should the Findlays go to sell Walter's appliance store? Maude is appalled to find that Walter has supplied a date for a rich investor who's coning to dinner.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is in for a bit of a shock when a package she thinks is a gift from her ex-husband turns out to be all that is left of him...literally, leaving her responsible for disposing of his ashes in a very particular manner.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and time for Walter's annual party for his employees. But he's certain the fun will be spoiled by Maude's houseguest, a women's rights activist given to confrontations.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's priceless crystal bowl gets broken -- and there are three conflicting stories describing the accident.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The biggest surprise at Walter's surprise birthday party is his arrest for 'lewd and lascivious' behavior. Walter's alibi is almost as embarrassing to him as the charge itself: he was stuffing himself with popcorn at a Donald Duck film festival.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Henry Fonda makes a rare television guest appearance when Maude decides he is an ideal candidate for President of the United States and starts the campaign without him, in the first half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude persists in spearheading a movement to draft Henry Fonda for President and has everyone around her convinced that she must be a manic-depressive in need of professional care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude uses her position as director of Tuckahoe's Bicentennial musical extravaganza to create a tribute to American women -- a theme that hardly thrills Walter, Arthur, and the colonel in charge of the armory where the show is to be staged.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Is the Honeymoon period over already? The rumor mill has it that Lisa (Eva Gabor) has packed up and left Oliver (Eddie Albert). Actually, she went back to New York to close up their penthouse apartment. And Mr. Haney is up to his old tricks!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The cow that Oliver (Eddie Albert) bought from Mr. Haney is pregnant. Afraid that Haney will claim the new calf, Oliver and Eb decide to keep it secret...only to have the people of Hooterville think that it is Lisa (Eva Gabor) who is expecting!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) calls in a roofer, a plumber, and agricultural expert Hank Kimball (Alvy Moore). All of them give the same appraisal of his farm: it's a disaster! Meanwhile, Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) has a few chickens he'd like to rent out!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Douglases are awaiting the arrival of their furniture and they don't know it, but Oliver's mother is on her way, too. But when the furniture is accidentally delivered to Mr. Haney's new place, he tries to sell their own possession back to them.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Planting season ends in three weeks and Oliver has yet to get his land plowed. Meanwhile, Uncle Joe (Edgar Buchanan) needs a new shotgun before duck hunting season starts and schemes to solve both of their problems...without Oliver knowing it.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) sends a sample of his soil to the State Scientific College, a report comes back that his farm contains ingredients never before found in soil. Could his soil problems just be cosmetic? Eleanor Audley guest stars.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Relying on statistics provided by the Department of Agriculture, Oliver (Eddie Albert) decides to plant wheat. But when he goes to Drucker's to buy seed, he learns the other farmers have a unique way to predict the best crop… Mrs. Ziffel's lumbago.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a rift between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) plants his entire 160 acres with wheat, only to hear from The Crabwell Corners Conservation and Stabilization Committee, a local farm organization, that he was only permitted to grow eight acres of wheat…because of Mr. Haney.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's the Douglases' wedding anniversary and, after initially pretending not to remember, Oliver (Eddie Albert) makes clear that he knows the date very well…he just can't remember exactly how many years he and Lisa (Eva Gabor) have been married.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Gluttonous jurors,lodged at the Shady Rest hotel, refuse to reach a verdict because they like Kate's food so much.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate believes she has lost her mind when she finds that one of her guests at the Shady Rest hotel is invisible.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate tries to refurbish the Shady Rest hotel to attract conventions, while Uncle Joe plans to make it a shambles to reduce taxes.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate fights a no holds-barred "hotel war" with Murdock Sneep, unscrupulous operator plane of the rival Pixley Hotel.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: On an excursion to Pixley, Uncle Joe stumbles on a fortune in buried money.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle's Joe solicitude threatens the 10-year marriage of a couple who have returned to the Shady Rest for a second honeymoon.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Convinced that her daughters would like to move to New York, Kate clinches a deal to sell the Shady Rest hotel.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate acts as peacemaker when a feud between Floyd and Charley threatens to end the operation of the Hooterville Cannonball.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A man offers a $1,000,000 reward for the capture - dead or alive - of the man who raped and murdered his daughter on a public tennis court, throwing the city into greed-fueled chaos.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A wealthy teen is abducted and his girlfriend is murdered. The killers demand a ransom but they also demand that Lt. Stone deliver the ransom payment.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A millionaire sets up a bomb in his boat to fake his death. Barnaby is contacted by the girlfriend of his boat "captain" to investigate what happened. Small clues like hand-tied flies, a cat boarded at a vet's, and an apple slicer bring Barnaby.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A black funeral wreath on his office door predicts Barnaby's death on Sunday. Even after he figures out who the psycho ex-convict is with a vendetta against him, Barnaby is stymied until his daughter-in-law is held hostage.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Pressure to get good grades at a private high school leads to the death of an instructor. The conspirators try to place the blame first on the victim's drinking and then on the black tennis coach.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: After a blow kills his lover's husband, the quick-thinking killer calls the police and, pretending to be the victim, lays the blame on two hippies.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: What's the perfect heroin-smuggling plot? Hide it in the radiator of a car owned by a tourist above suspicion--Barnaby Jones.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An author whose novels feature his hometown disappears; the publisher hires Barnaby to find the last chapter of the newest novel.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Buddy Ebsen guest stars as a cunning college professor who plots an elaborate scheme to cash $750,000 worth of stolen travelers' checks.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Vic Morrow guest stars as Edward Heron, a tourist in Hawaii, who, after being mugged and hospitalized, becomes the object of McGarrett's suspicions when he refuses to press charges and disappears from the hospital.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A psychotic sniper endangers the lives of motorists as he fires at cars from a hillside bunker overlooking a major highway.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett, while investigating the death of an airport security undercover agent, comes upon an air cargo hijacking ring.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Five upstanding citizens seek their own revenge through a criminal act — the theft of $6 million. The precision and elaborate planning employed by the group make their scheme a seemingly perfect crime, even to the Five-O investigation team.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: When a candidate for the Mayoral elections is conveniently out of the way, the Saint will try to expose the corruption by offering an irresistible bait.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed takes Venus to a fairground in search of a corpse.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Why does a clown want to murder Steed? Cathy joins a circus to find the answer.

programme.title: The Avengers

programme.title: Con el culo al aire

programme.title: Con el culo al aire

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The last time Crystal was here, she got a DNA denial, but is back to test another potential father. Then, Aaron and his new girlfriend say there's no way Aaron is the father of Marissa's baby. What truths will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Sean and his girlfriend Lanika deny that he is the father of Rebecca's baby. Then, Kyrstal and Precious want to prove that their brother London did not father Paula's baby. Teen mom Alicia cheated on Tony, but doesn't know if he's the baby's father!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki’s boyfriend Tavon is a cheater. What will they say when he is caught on our hidden camera? Then, are James’ kids with Nikkie actually his?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On Today's MAURY… The time for lying is over and the truth will be revealed. Who's right and who's about to get caught red handed! It's wild tales of cheating lovers forced to face the lie detector results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Talisa found a woman hiding in her boyfriend Andre's closet. Can he pass Maury's sexy decoy test? Then, Nikki's entire family is on the line because she has to prove that she has not cheated on her husband Daniel and that he fathered her kids.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Pastor Terry’s wife cheat on him with 200 different men? Then Naomi wants to find out if her fiancé Jesse is a cheater. What will the results reveal on Maury today?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today, Maury follows up with prior guests to see what happened when the cameras stopped rolling! Which women left their cheating men? Which controlling men changed their ways? Plus outrageous paternity updates!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today on MAURY, Brian, his mom, and his sister deny Sarah's baby. Then, Robert always wanted a dad, but James always denied him. Plus it's grandmother versus grandmother in a DNA war that spans generations!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The lie detector results are in and the truth is coming out! These guests say their loved ones are cheating behind their backs. But who cheated? How many times? And can they handle the results? All will be revealed on the today's explosive MAURY.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time Lissett was on the show, she proved to her man Orlando that she was not a cheater. This time Lissett's sister has something crazy to confess! Then, Dretta's convinced that James is plowing more than other women's driveways.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Tammy suspects her husband Johnnie is sleeping with Renee and is Robert listening to his sister and cheating on his teen fiancée Raven? Plus, did Tom sleep with his best friend’s wife Angela? Marriages are on cliff’s edge today!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Da'Shan is here with his new girl Tyrekia to prove that he's not the father of Ashley's baby! Ashley is 1000% positive that Da'Shan is the father and is here to prove it once and for all. But what will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. What will they say when they watch him on our hidden cameras? Then, was Naomi's fiancé able to resist our sexy decoy? Plus, is Jeremiah's baby with Robin really his?

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Fikret compra la casa inesperadamente, lo que hace muy feliz a İpek y molesta mucho a Esma y Faruk. Süreyya confronta a Esma sobre el matrimonio que Esma quiere imponerle a Bade.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: La casa está en crisis después del asunto de Bade y Murat, y Faruk quiere calmar la situación y organiza una barbacoa para la familia.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Cuando İdil no puede estar en casa con Emir después del tratamiento de Begüm, Süreyya lo invita a quedarse con ellos.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk está molesto con Begüm y sospecha sus intenciones reales. Más tarde recuerda a un amigo cercano de Begüm y se convence de que Emir es el hijo de ese amigo. Süreyya y Emir se acercan cada vez más.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk le dice a su madre que Emir tiene otro padre. Esma va a hablar con Begüm. Los cuatro hermanos organizan una fiesta sorpresa para Esma en honor al Día de la Madre.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk habla con Begüm y descubre que Emir es en realidad su hijo. Esma recibe los resultados de la prueba de ADN y descubre que Emir es su nieto.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk invita a la señora Esma a su oficina para confrontarla. Él la acusa de dejar Begüm y de haberle robado 10 años de su vida como padre de Emir.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma le hace una visita sorpresa a Begüm para exigirle cómo debe tratar a Emir. Süreyya es informada de que necesita una amniocentesis. İpek descubre que está embarazada.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Emir le devuelve a Esma el broche que se le cayó cuando fue a hablar con Begüm, y Faruk enfurece al enterarse de esa visita, por lo que decide dejar la mansión junto con Süreyya.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma deja la mansión con Nurgül y Mustafa sin avisar a nadie. Faruk y Süreyya van a ver la casa a la que se mudarán muy pronto.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: İpek llega al nuevo hogar de Süreyya y Faruk para contarle a Süreyya sobre la relación pasada entre Faruk y Begüm. Murat es gravemente herido en un accidente de motocicleta.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Begüm invita a Faruk a su casa para ver fotos de Emir de cuando era un bebé. Süreyya llega inesperadamente a la casa de Begüm y los encuentra a ambos juntos.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Süreyya se enfrenta a Dilara y la presiona para que averigüe si Adem es su compañero en la escuela de música. Bade visita a Murat en el hospital.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una pastilla amarga para tragar
programme.desc: Se cuenta la historia de la bombero Michelle Baker. Después de conocer al Dr. Maynard Muntzing, quedó embarazada de él. Después de esta noticia, ella se enfermaba siempre que estaban juntos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un corredor de bolsa exitoso no regresa a casa después de su turno, su esposa lo reporta como desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Huellas entre ladrones
programme.desc: El asesinato de un excéntrico millonario no fue del todo inesperado; alardeaba de su riqueza y se preocupaba poco por la seguridad personal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
