programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: Humankind faces total destruction. Can the Doctor defeat the Wirrn?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: Trapped by the Wirrn, The Doctor and his friends are forced into one last terrible gamble.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry, and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Time Lords send the Doctor, Sarah, and Harry to Skaro at a point in time shortly before the creation of the Daleks. The Doctor's mission is to destroy his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor finds that some of Davros's fellow Kaleds are unhappy with the development of the Daleks. Sarah is forced to load a Thal war rocket with radioactive explosives.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker. But Davros is one step ahead and prepares to take drastic action.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed by the Thals' rocket, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory. But then, the Daleks appear and a massacre begins.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: With Harry and Sarah as his prisoners, Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks so that he can learn from their defeats to make them stronger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Kaled scientific elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks while the Doctor prepares to destroy them forever. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: The crew of Nerva has fallen victim to a space plague.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: Sarah is a victim of the plague and the only cure is to transmat her down to Voga.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: Nerva Beacon is invaded by the Cybermen who are intent on destroying Voga.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: The Cybermen intend to crash the bomb-laden Nerva Beacon into the planet Voga.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Juan Pablo encuentra a Esther y la convence de dar la cara y luchar por sus derechos. Iris le ofrece a Teresa Cristina ser su coartada para el día que murió Marcela. Ro transforma a Celeste, la maquilla y la viste, pero Manuel se molesta al verla.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: El detective no acepta la coartada de Teresa Cristina. Mientras Esther se ausenta para enfrentar a Beatriz, Juan Pablo cuida a Victoria y comienza a quererla. Reinaldo le promete a Griselda que es su única mujer, pero ella sigue sin creerle.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: La doctora Alba da su versión de los hechos a la prensa y luego Beatriz cuenta su verdad. Esther ve en las noticias la rueda de prensa, llama a Gabriel y le dice que volverá a pelear por Victoria. Todos se preguntan cómo se resolverá este caso.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Suena la marcha nupcial y Sara entra a la iglesia para unirse a Cristóbal. La ceremonia se está realizando, cuando el primero en interrumpir la boda es el que al final es el más sorprendido. Los invitados son testigos de la fuerza del verdadero amor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: A Marisa Luján no le tiemblan las piernas para entrar a la iglesia y develar frente a todos los secretos que Sara intenta mantener ocultos. Son muchas las voces que se suman a la de Marisa para poder desenmascarar todos los engaños de la novia.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal le suplica a Marisa que lo perdone, tratando de convencerla de rehacer sus vidas, dejando a un lado el orgullo y el dolor de sus heridas. Sara huye con su principal cómplice, mientras las unidades de la policía se activan en Queens.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Amelia reconoce cual es la mujer que tiene el empuje, el valor y el corazón necesarios para acompañar a su hijo. A Marisa le hará falta más que esa fortaleza para enfrentar la venganza que está planeando Sara. Cristóbal recibe una visita inesperada.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara Montero planifica más que un secuestro para lucirse con su maldad y ejecutar la peor tortura para Marisa. La sed de venganza de Estanislao toma el control de la situación, cuando llegan a un escondite en el que creen que no podrán ser encontrados.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa vive con angustia, a la espera de la llamada de los secuestradores para exigir sus condiciones. A pesar de seguir las coordenadas, la policía no se espera los planes de Estanislao. Pero aparece alguien con la clave para el rescate.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: No solo la policía llega al escondite de Sara Montiel, donde comienza un enfrentamiento feroz, y el rescate de Lalo se convierte en un duelo a muerte entre Calixta y el Polaco. El plan de Cristóbal no será suficiente para liberar al hijo de Marisa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara, desesperada por acabar con su enemiga, tendrá el destino que jamás imaginó. El camino queda libre para llevar adelante los proyectos prometidos en la campaña del senador Parker y, en especial, el que unirá para siempre a Marisa y a Cristóbal.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia está muy ansiosa por llegar al pueblo de Trinidad para recobrar a sus gemelos, ellos presienten que su madre puede estar en peligro. Su exsuegra cree que ella aún está en la cárcel.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no entiende por qué Alicia le huye después de salvarle la vida, pero él insiste en acercarse. Perfecta quiere impedir de cualquier manera que ella pueda ver a los niños.

programme.title: La estrategia de Perfecta
programme.desc: Perfecta pide ayuda cuando Alicia reclama a gritos sus derechos a las puertas de la familia Blanco, ella tiene que asumir las consecuencias de su escándalo. Un hombre misterioso la espía.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta le hace la guerra a Alicia para que no consiga ni posada, ni comida. Laurentino prepara una estocada final, como abogado de la familia Blanco quiere que ella se vaya del pueblo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo habla con el detective e identifica a la mujer buscada por asesinato como Teresa Cristina. El caso de Esther sale publicado y todos lo comentan. Patricia se siente mal, teme que su madre sea un monstruo. Teresa Cristina se cita con Fernando.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Juan Pablo encuentra a Esther y la convence de dar la cara y luchar por sus derechos. Iris le ofrece a Teresa Cristina ser su coartada para el día que murió Marcela. Ro transforma a Celeste, la maquilla y la viste, pero Manuel se molesta al verla.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: El detective no acepta la coartada de Teresa Cristina. Mientras Esther se ausenta para enfrentar a Beatriz, Juan Pablo cuida a Victoria y comienza a quererla. Reinaldo le promete a Griselda que es su única mujer, pero ella sigue sin creerle.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A beam will be hung above another beam. Contestants are to devour the covered trays that conceal six different types of Fear Factor Sausage. Both team members will be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the back of the fireboat. Contestant will have the option to drink up to three habanero pepper smoothie shots. One contestant will be standing at the top of a fire slide while their partner is standing at the slide-stairs.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked to a net that is dangling from the cargo load ramp of a Sikorsky helicopter over the water. Contestants must make their way through a maze. Contestants must climb into the back of a car that is slowly filling with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Merantau
programme.desc: Leaving the simple life in rural West Sumatera, Yuda must undergo merantau, the traditional rite of passage in which a young man must leave his family’s home to make it on his own.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Crazy Samurai: 400 vs 1

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Lela's es un restaurante exclusivo que desesperadamente necesita más clientela.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Sebastian's prepara comida congelada de un menú complejo y los meseros están más preocupados por las audiciones para sus papeles de actuación que por servir las comidas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.desc: Astronema assembles a team of evil Psycho Rangers to solidify her power.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.desc: The Galaxy Rangers are born as five heroes unite to protect the planet Mirinoi from the villain Furio.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: The Rangers befriend the Galactabeasts - five enormous animals that help them defend Terra Venture from the forces of the evil Scorpius.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy
programme.desc: The shape-changing monster Mutantrum poses as Mike to lure Leo to the legendary Lights of Orion.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Lost Galaxy

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.desc: Larry reads an article about a female serial killer and becomes suspicious of Mary Anne.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Mets' storied franchise had gone 50 years without throwing a no-hitter. After numerous close calls, history was finally made on June 1, 2012 when Johan Santana needed 134 pitches to hold the Cardinals hitless in an 8-0 win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Felix Hernandez had never thrown a no-hitter throughout the first seven years of his career, but on August 14, 2012, the King was perfect for 27 straight outs against the Rays to throw the first perfect game in Mariners history.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/5/12: In what would be Chipper Jones' final game of his career, the Braves took on the Cardinals in the NL Wild Card Game, which was highlighted by a controversial infield fly rule in the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/18/12: Max Scherzer struck out 10 batters and Miguel Cabrera homered to lead the Tigers in Game 4 of the ALCS, completing a four-game sweep of the Yankees.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 4/1/2013: Clayton Kershaw crushes his first career home run on Opening Day in 2013, breaking a scoreless tie in the 8th inning to go along with a shutout performance on the mound in the Dodgers' 4-0 win over the Giants.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/21/13: Mike Trout becomes the youngest player to ever hit a cycle, logging a single, double, triple, and a home-run in the Angels' 12-0 win over the Mariners.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bruno, el ex de Vaski, llega y tiene una cita con Apolo. Julienne se pelea con Mari F por Ortega. Muchos besos en la fiesta fetichista y a Gab le regalan la primera suite triple master, con Lua y Leticia, la noche está llena de sexo, confusión y llanto.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kevis suspects Ashley of cheating, while she accuses him of infidelity. With a lie detector test, Steve aims to uncover the truth and shock them both. Secrets will be revealed, challenging their perceptions and relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Stephanie gave birth to a baby boy and she believes Brandon is the father. But Brandon claims he didn't find out about the child until three years later and he denies being the father. Stephanie and her mother want Brandon to step up.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tres años más tarde, Elizabeth todavía tiene muchas dudas sobre las intenciones de Manny con su familia y su marido Rodney está en medio. ¿Manny es inocente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Joyia está desesperada por evitar que su amiga Stephanie vuelva con su problemático ex Scott. ¡Pero ella todavía lo ama! ¿Tendrá la voluntad de dejarlo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel acosa a Eva con su amenaza de desenmascarar ante Luis Mario la dudosa situación sobre su paternidad del recién nacido hijo de Eva. Camelia llena de intrigas la cabeza de Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura aprovecha su momento de una revancha en contra de Eduarda al saber que Luis Mario fue expulsado de la hacienda por su hermana, al no querer reconocerlo como un Arismendi.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura esta desconcertada al saber que Luis Mario se involucro sentimentalmente con otra mujer. Caridad intenta tranquilizarla con sus palabras.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.desc: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.

programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp finds an amazing pair of sharpshooter’s goggles, but they lead to a run-in with Daddy the Parent – the greatest gunslinger ever! Now, the Straw Hat marksman is headed for the deadliest of all duels.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A cooking competition with the fiery chef Carmen rekindles Sanji’s dreams of the legendary All Blue.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: As a storm batters Logue Town, Buggy, Alvida, and Captain Smoker close in on Luffy for a stirring final showdown!

programme.desc: The discovery of a small girl adrift in an abandoned lifeboat interrupts Luffy and his crew’s voyage to the Grand Line.

programme.desc: Make money with the Pawn Stars as they are presented with a one of a kind U.S. postage printing plate from 1862. Will the guys trek through rain or heat or gloom of night to make a deal or will they return this one to sender?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy one of the most recognizable cars of all time: The Batmobile. Will they use every gadget on their tool-belt for this set of wheels?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Batter up with the Pawn Stars when an autographed photo of Babe Ruth slides into the shop. Will Rick go into extra innings for this rare piece of baseball memorabilia or will a tough negotiation cause him to swing and miss?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get revved up with the Pawn Stars as they check out a rare REO Flying Cloud hot rod from the 1930s. Will Rick muster the strength to crank up an offer for this classic ride or will the deal take a detour and sputter out?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare for battle when a one-man submarine surfaces at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars take evasive action when a Cold War era heat-seeking missile guidance system locks onto the shop. Will the guys engage and try to blast this deal out of the sky or is this former military secret still too hot to handle?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In aptly named Pickens, South Carolina, the guys scour the sprawling inventory of a father-and-son picking duo.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As the guys are winding down their trip through the South, Danielle finds them the mother lode of rare motorbike parts in an old warehouse packed with new vintage Harley stock.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While in Kansas, the guys comb through a promising farmyard littered with stuff but are frustrated when they find nothing at all to buy. Their luck changes when they meet demolition expert Johnny Walker. His collection is staggering.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are in Missouri, heading towards an inherited old farm with plenty of promise. But then Danielle calls with news about an ultimate prize.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars become a house divided when a Confederate Civil War knife marches into the shop. Will the guys sharpen their tactics to take a stab at this rare piece?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Take a seat with the Pawn Stars as a chair from the U.S. Senate floor rolls through their doors.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare to be boarded when a customer brings in a 1600's naval blunderbuss. A small weapon thought to be for a child, will this pint-size gun bring an adult-size price or will this deal end up shooting blanks?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars snap to attention as they check out a photo album signed by one of history's greatest military leaders--General George S. Patton.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars call Houston with a problem when they are presented with a piece of the heat shield from NASA's most heroic flight--Apollo 13.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th installment of the series pits Bond (Pierce Brosnan) against a powerful media mogul (Jonathan Pryce) and his wife (Teri Hatcher) who has a secret past with Bond.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: In the 19th film of the franchise, James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) is once again pitted against Valentin Zukovsky (Robbie Coltrane), the Russian mobster from Goldeneye. Judi Dench returns as M and Desmond Llewelyn returns as Q.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: James Bond's newest mission begins with a spectacular high-speed hovercraft chase through a minefield in the demilitarized zone separating North and South Korea - and the action doesn't let up until the credits roll.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Licencia para matar
programme.desc: James Bond se lanza en su aventura más apasionada -- no por su país, no por la justicia, sino por venganza personal. Timothy Dalton aporta urgencia, encanto y determinación mortal en su papel como el agente 007.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The outbreak of World War III has occurred, leaving a group of mid-Westernrn high school students turned refugees to slowly organize themselves into an effective guerilla force.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: When Russian neo-nationalists hijack Air Force One, the world's most secure aircraft, the President is faced with the decision to give in to terrorist demands or sacrifice the country's dignity and the lives of his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: A New York City cop faces a terrorist group in his wife's office building.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: When sadistic thugs attack John Wick (Keanu Reeves) – a brilliantly lethal ex-assassin - he hunts them down with the skill and ruthlessness that made him an underworld legend.

programme.title: John Wick 2
programme.desc: John Wick is forced out of retirement, and this time, he must face off against a shadowy international assassins' guild and more of the world's deadliest killers.

programme.title: Grizzly Man
programme.desc: Werner Herzog (Cave of Forgotten Dreams) crafts a compelling documentary look at wildlife preservationist Timothy Treadwell, who lived unarmed among grizzly bears in Alaska.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Utila

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: Fish is commonly known as a light, very delicate and tasty food source.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the notorious tiger fish.

programme.title: Uncaged
programme.desc: In this episode, we travel to America's heartland featuring incredible animals including the badger, wolverine, blue heron, sandhill crane, whitetail deer, raccoon, and beaver.

programme.title: Last Paradises, Symphony of Life - Underwater World of Australia
programme.desc: Australia stands for tourism icons like the Ayers Rock, the Pinnacles and the Kakadu National Park.

programme.title: Blue Water Savages
programme.desc: Robin and Eli encounter the oceanic whitetip shark, one of the most dangerous sharks in the world. They are in the Bahamas to understand more about this predator, infamous for snacking on ship wreck survivors.

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Rugged rocks, blue sea and idyllic, sandy beaches - this is the Mediterranean as we know it.

programme.title: Elephants of Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: The elephant is the largest and most impressive of all the animals that live on and around Mount Kilimanjaro. Take a journey of exploration, adventure and revelation as we follow their footsteps up Kilimanjaro.

programme.title: Nomads of the Serengeti
programme.desc: This is one of the greatest migrations in nature: the wildebeest migration. For just over 3 months, Jean Du Plessis follows them from the crossing of the Mara River to the mass birthing grounds, where millions of animals are in constant motion.

programme.title: Human Prey
programme.desc: What's it like to be hunted down by the ocean's most powerful predator? A diver ends up inside the jaws of a Great White; an Alabama triathlete becomes the target of a bull shark; and, a spearfisherman inadvertently ends up as bait for a Great White.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: Shocked by the devastation of their home, Crystal decides to leave the Graveyard forcing the troop to live as nomads in the forest. Feisty Tornado leader Amazon sets her sights on the vacated territory.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti
programme.desc: Explore the many different concepts of family in the natural world. See how animals get together, raising of cubs and chicks, and learn how family bonds can determine an animal’s fate.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote gets stung by a tarantula hawk, which boasts the world's second most painful sting!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote gets face to face with one of the most beautiful snakes in the world: the eyelash viper!

programme.title: Monkey Thieves (Dooya)
programme.desc: Zamir launches a leadership bid that ends in disaster when a baby is fatally wounded, and the pretender to his throne is driven out of the group.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: The North American wilderness is smaller and more fragmented than ever. Yet somehow, the white-tailed deer population has exploded. White-tailed deer were once totally eliminated from some parts of their range.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and Mark go kayaking next to one of the largest predators in the world: killer whales!

programme.title: Get Wild
programme.desc: Learning about leopards, koala bears, rocky mountain elk and gorillas.

programme.title: Snake Boss
programme.desc: Julia comes to the aid of a dehydrated python who needs to be taken to the RSPCA, and there's a remarkable confrontation between a Keelback and a highly poisonous cane toad.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew catch sea turtles off the coast of Australia!

programme.title: Panda Nursery
programme.desc: Witness an amazing partnership between humans and pandas as together they raise two tiny twin cubs in an effort to increase the world’s wild panda population.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: In this episode of Americana Outdoors we meet up with Wade Middleton as he shares his thoughts on Turkey hunting and why he enjoys it so much.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting with air bows and air guns is growing in popularity across the nation. Here’s a look at several of our favorite hunts using these platforms by Umarex Airguns!

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The lads are in Scotland and it's the middle of winter. They're on a mission to catch Ling from the WWI and WWII wrecks of Scapa Flow. It's cold, and the fish will be slow moving and tucked into and under the wrecked ships.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: It's the middle of winter and the lads are in Norway to catch the king crab. The team journey up the coast of Norway braving sub-zero temperatures and learning all they can along the way for their final mission, to dive under the ice.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A chimpanzee chases a volunteer, and a great white shark attacks a surfer.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A rattlesnake bites a man alone, and an alligator drags a woman underwater.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Dangerous gators convince the Gator Boys they need Jimmy back.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul tries to find help for injured alligator's mouth.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Two families are torn apart by one member's choice to keep big cats close at hand.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: An Australian man keeps two 10-foot saltwater crocs in a shed in his backyard. Aussie Vicky Lowing shares her suburban home with three pet crocodiles, one of whom she takes for drives in the car, another that lives in the bath.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One man moves his family to a trailer where they share their space with more than 200 snakes. Another man continues to milk deadly snakes on a daily basis, despite developing a life-threatening allergy to venom.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Pacific Island
programme.desc: On a deserted Panamanian island, Bear Grylls creates critical fresh water and uses tribal techniques to fish before taking his chances at sea on a homemade raft.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: China
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes on Southern China in the aftermath of a typhoon. He tackles swollen rivers, climbs limestone gorges, is attacked by stinging ants, and uses ancient tribal techniques to catch bats for food.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Plagued with truck troubles, Robin and his crew race to get a fuel run done before the equipment runs dry. Claudia hires Scrappy Larry to clean up the Jade City yard but he makes a bigger mess.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin clashes with Claudia and Josh over the quality of jade coming out of their pit, while Larry's attempt to help get the crew bunkhouse to camp goes sideways.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Bad brakes, frazzled nerves, and a rough road have Claudia doubting her crew can haul their huge bunkhouse to camp in one piece.

programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Farscape

programme.desc: Crichton correctly predicts a wormhole's appearance near Moya, but simultaneously a giant space plant captures the Leviathan.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: Mars Rising

programme.title: Mars Rising
programme.desc: The spacecraft that will take a crew to Mars will be assembled–in space. Will the fuel be thermo-nuclear or super-heated charged particles? Engineers must get it right–or the crew will die.

programme.title: Mars Rising
programme.desc: With zero gravity depleting muscle and cosmic radiation causing cancer, a three-year voyage to Mars in this environment could be punishing for the human body. How will we protect it?

programme.title: Mars Rising

programme.title: Mars Rising
programme.desc: The last six minutes of the flight to Mars is the most dangerous. Only an inflatable aeroshell will protect the capsule as it enters Mars' atmosphere at a temperature of 4,000C and 16,000 kph.

programme.title: Mars Rising

programme.title: Mega Mechanics

programme.title: Mega Mechanics

programme.title: Mega Mechanics

programme.title: Megastructures

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Después de que la policía encontró armas en el departamento de Paulo, el inspector Viñas y su compañera, Gabriela, profundizan en la investigación de la muerte de Paulo y el suicidio se convierte en un asesinato para ellos.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Las últimas pistas encontradas por la policía les hacen pensar que Paulo estaba traficando con armas ilegalmente.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Cuando un policía británico es encontrado asesinado en la pequeña isla paradisíaca de Saint-Marie, el detective Richard Poole es enviado a investigar. Sería el hombre perfecto para resolver el caso, si no fuera porque odia el sol, el mar y la arena.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Mientras el detective anda en busca de una taza decente de té, una novia es asesinada el día de su boda. Es una tragedia que la sargenta Bordey no puede sino notificar, mientras que Richard está más interesado en las señales de los quehaceres domésticos.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer no solo predice su propia muerte, sino que además brinda una descripción del asesinato, todo resulta aparentemente fácil para el detective Poole. ¿Puede un caso del pasado ayudar a resolver un crimen del presente?

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don y el equipo persiguen al asesino de dos escaladores en posesión de un diamante robado, mientras Charlie decide si reinstaurar su permiso del FBI, un nuevo agente se une al equipo en el estreno de la quinta temporada.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: El equipo investiga una tendencia en aumento de secuestros en cajeros automáticos, cuando una mujer que fue secuestrada y obligada a retirar cantidades aleatorias de dinero en el cajero automático es asesinada.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Cuando ocho personas, entre ellas dos funcionarios de policía, son ejecutadas en una cafetería, un detective de la policía de Los Ángeles se encarga del caso y descubre un rastro de chantaje, romance y corrupción.

programme.title: Brother United
programme.desc: Alan Moerman, de 21 años, y su hermano pequeño, Dennis, comparten la pasión por el fútbol. Sueñan con convertirse en futbolistas profesionales. Para uno de ellos, ese sueño podría hacerse realidad

programme.title: Brother United
programme.desc: A Dennis le ofrecen un contrato para jugar en primera división. Mientras Dennis se las arregla en el campo, Alan tiene que intentar encontrar un nuevo trabajo, pero lo único que le importa es convertirse en futbolista profesional. Nada más le importa.

programme.title: Brother United
programme.desc: Dennis empieza en el banquillo, pero el entrenador Deboosere decide dar al nuevo jugador su primera oportunidad de jugar. Una decisión que no deja de tener consecuencias. Roel Thevenage no puede soportar la atención que recibe el nuevo jugador del KRC.

programme.desc: When Calvin hires Grover to work part-time at his business, he soon realizes the pre-teen is not a good fit. Also, Marty and Necie reconsider their living situation.

programme.desc: When Calvin's favorite restaurant closes and is replaced by a flashy pet spa, he worries the community is losing too many small businesses and starts a campaign to only buy local.

programme.title: Brockmire

programme.title: Brockmire
programme.desc: As Beth was growing up, Jim told her everything he knew about her deceased birth mother, but she finds out that he lied to her. On the biggest day of Jim's life, Beth is supposed to give a speech to memorialize him but shows up ready to destroy him.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie coaches Elka in how to ask a guy out, Victoria makes repeat trips to a bulk warehouse store, and Joy thinks the younger man she's dating may be her son.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie, Joy and Victoria endure different forms of blind date disaster after setting each other up with men, while Elka hits it off with the charming Max.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria's lady-loving thespian father and Melanie's worrywart mother both visit the house, and Elka becomes buddies with Joy's critical mother via video chat.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: The women crash a Rock & Roll Hall of Fame party, where Melanie awkwardly meets her idol, and Victoria seeks revenge on her former bad boy flame Johnny Revere.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria is offered a Japanese commercial for an embarrassing product, and Melanie worries that local columnist Rick will write an unflattering piece about her.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While Victoria and Joy try to dissuade Melanie from getting back together with her ex-husband, Elka is caught in a love triangle between Max and Nick.

programme.desc: Joy feels abandoned by Melanie, who is focusing on her new boyfriend Pete, and a theatrical teenager asks Victoria to advise his high school production of Shakespeare.

programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac fails his driver's license test because of a ridiculously strict Hovering Vehicles Department employee, Mr. Strickler. Then, to save Pac-World, Pac has to fly the Paccerchini into the Netherworld,

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: It looks like Betrayus' fortunes are changing when he summons a Nether-Witch to curse Pac Man with bad luck. The only catch is, the witch will only turn over the potion if Betrayus promises to marry her.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks lures a giant Ghosteroidto threaten PacWorld, and Pac-Man must grow to planet proportions to save the day. But who's gonna save Planet Pac from the repercussions of his enlargement?

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Once every 100 Halloweens, the two moons of PacWorld turn blue, so Betrayus summons the sinister Count Pacula to drain the last Yellow Orb in PacWorld - namely Pac-Man!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: After Rosebud unwittingly tries to cook a talking squirrel, she and the kids are pulled into a squirrel-based dimension to be judged by a jury of their squirrel-peers. McGee has a bad dream where he strolls into the dining hall in his underwear!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When a DISCO-BALL MOON rises over Lakebottom, Rosebud and Armand warn the kids to stop ALL partying at once, lest the strange Party Animal appears! The kids discover an elephant that befriends Gretch!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The staff try to up their Summerween game, by building a haunted house that will scare the bottomdwellers! The kids are now stuck inside the House of Horrors, determined to figure out who Gluteus Crouch really is!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: A storm gives McGee a nasal infection that allows him to see the future. When Slimey ditches the bottomdwellers, the kids are determined to find out where he went.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: An old McGee travels back from the future to present-day to stop a BBQ that infects the staff with MONSTER VIRUS! After the letters that McGee wrote to his mom are returned to sender, the Lakebottom Crew hits the road to find out what happened.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: After years on the road, Willy and the rest of the Zilla clan arrive in their new, adopted hometown of Silent Springs.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy and his mom decide to get involved with the local Christmas pageant.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Still adjusting to life in the weird and wonderful Zilla mansion, Willy awakens one night to the wails of a ghost somewhere deep in the house.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy is just beginning to develop his talents in the brass section of the school band, when Principal Malfactor shuts down the Music Program, to divert money to buy the Football team new equipment.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: When Willy spots the angelically beautiful Angela, it's love at first sight and the feeling is mutual, as Angela asks Willy out on a pre-date.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy is faced with having to pass a crucial math test that will determine whether he has to go to a summer self-guided class that has just one other student, his nemesis, Buzz.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: When Willy asks to sign up for a camping trip with Quincy and Alissa, Rock and Crystal decide it would be a great opportunity to spend quality time with their son if they organized a trip for Willy and his pals instead.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: When Grandpa and Grandma Zilla show up for a surprise visit, Rock is less than thrilled about spending the next couple of days with his father.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Welcome to "Girls' Night In", where the cast of Teen Mom OG along with friends watch Teen Mom 2. In the premiere episode, Maci and Taylor sympathize with Briana's co-parenting struggles while Cheyenne roots for Bar as he prepares to propose to Ashley.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: All of the TMOGs are anxious to find out if Ashley said "yes" to Bar's proposal. Amber gets Leah's fear that pain medication will cause a relapse. Cate and Tyler feel for Jade's struggles with the pressures of moving, parenting and filming.

programme.desc: Cate and Tyler are delighted when Kail lets Isaac design his own room. Maci, Taylor and Raj dismiss the ring Sean gives Jade. Chey and her family enjoy meeting Briana's mysterious new boyfriend. Amber and Tonya worry about Leah's Covid exposure.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Everyone is horrified by Jade's plastic surgery experience but are grateful Briana steps in to help out. Cheyenne and family cheer on Ashley as she moves while planning her wedding. Amber and Krystal celebrate Leah, who gets Ali a new wheelchair.
